prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 452 cu in (7.4 L) Cadillac V-16 (engine code: *Type 452*) with a fully machined and balanced forged internals build featuring a billet crankshaft from *Callies Performance Products*, forged aluminum pistons by *JE Pistons* (9.5:1 compression ratio), and *Manley Performance* H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a custom *Weber IDF 48mm* carburetor setup (dual-throttle bodies per bank) and a *MSD Ignition* 6AL-2 digital ignition system with *Accel* 300+ spark plug wires for optimized combustion.

Forced Induction: Install a *Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA* turbocharger (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a *Tial MV-R* 44mm wastegate and *TurboSmart* Race Port 50mm blow-off valve. Utilize a *PWR* custom intercooler (bar-and-plate design, 3.5" core thickness) and *Earl's Performance* -10AN braided stainless steel charge piping with *Vibrant Performance* silicone couplers for heat management.

Suspension & Handling: Convert to a *Detroit Speed* Quadralink IRS conversion kit (1939-1948 Ford-style) with *Ridetech* HQ Series coilovers (14-position rebound adjustment) and *Baer* 13" EradiSpeed rotors with *Wilwood* Superlite 6R calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear). Pair with *Hotchkis Sport Suspension* front sway bar (1.25" diameter) and *Energy Suspension* polyurethane bushings for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Body: Install a *Ringbrothers* custom steel widebody kit (hand-formed, 3" fender flares) with a *PPG* custom paint job in *House of Kolor* Kandy Apple Red over a *PPG* Black base. Add *Ditzler* clear coat for depth. Replace the grille with a *Billet Specialties* custom billet aluminum mesh grille (V16 emblem laser-etched).

Interior: Retrim the cabin in *Bridge of Weir* leather (two-tone black and red) with *Recaro* CS Sportster GT seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved). Install a *Momo* Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip) on a *Ididit* tilt column with a *Flaming River* U-joint. Add a *Dakota Digital* HDX-1000 gauge cluster (analog-style with LED backlighting) and a *Vintage Air* Gen-IV SureFit climate control system.

Lighting & Details: Convert to *Hella* Classic 500 headlamps (7" diameter, halogen) with *Morimoto* HID projector retrofit. Add *United Pacific* LED taillights (sequential turn signals) and *Dapper Lighting* vintage-style side markers. Install *Billet Specialties* billet aluminum door handles and *Fesler Built* billet fuel filler door (V16 emblem engraved).
